title: cleisostoma aikoae
intro: Cleisostoma aikoae is a species of orchid native to the Philippines, characterized by its small size and unique flower shape. Traditionally, Cleisostoma aikoae has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Cleisostoma aikoae is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
